comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Completed Phase 1 schema/error surface for Ralph. Added src/ralph/schema.ts and src/ralph/errors.ts, tightened LoopNameSchema to sanitized names, switched persisted loop-state decoding to strict schema codecs, and added boundary reporting so invalid persisted state is surfaced to the user instead of escaping from Ralph commands/tools/session handlers. Added test/ralph-schema.test.ts and updated Ralph regression tests to use schema-backed persisted state encoding. Verified with targeted Ralph schema/regression tests and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`. Review loop result: spec PASS, quality APPROVED.
